g.text: Adding a new Email or Phone Number - Overt Login
Wants to add a new email or SMS
Launches Browser or View with Browser chrome to Login Page w/callback
Submit phone or email to login
Persist sessionData w/associated authentication code and sessionId
Clicks link w/authentication code and sessionId
Send SMS authentication code (how does sessionId work here)
Fetch payload by authentication code and sessionId
display add email or SMS form (or autofill from Provider?)
Submits add email or SMS form
Persist payload w/associated verification code and sessionId
Clicks link w/verification code and sessionId
Send SMS verification code (how does sessionId work here)
Fetch payload by verification code and sessionId(?)
Persist new ProviderExternalUserDetail with new Email or SMS
Success page w/button back to provider?
Email or SMS added Callback (and potentially other state?)
